历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 11540 → 8891 → 30322 → 10101. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, there was an abnormal fluctuation (30322), which returned to 10101 in 2025. In recent two years, there is a trend of moving forward (ranking number decreasing). The baseline for 2025 is about 10101. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 91 in 2022, 90 in 2023, 90 in 2024, 91 in 2025, and 92 in 2026, a slight increase of 1 person compared to 2025, an expansion of about 1.1%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 41st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 40–43 range in recent years, with steadily improving comprehensive strength.
4. [Reputation Heat] In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (historical laboratory safety incident), but overall public opinion is stable; Douyin heat ranks 45th overall (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure; no record of admission cutoff breaks in the past 5 years, stable application psychology. Systems Science A+ (first in the country), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding strength in transportation and information disciplines, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with the university's advantageous disciplines; Civil Engineering and Architecture are clearly discouraged, but the university's Civil Engineering is an A- discipline, with limited impact from industry cooling; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (about 463,000), intensifying overall competition; Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Sichuan examinees; the university has a large enrollment scale in Sichuan (about 92 in science), making it a key source province outside the province, with high enrollment stability.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 10101 in 2025, a slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+1 person), and a significant increase in provincial examinees (+15.6%), the effect of expansion pushing back the ranking (ranking number increasing) is partially offset by intensified competition due to the surge in examinee numbers. Combined with factors such as stable school level, high popularity of advantageous disciplines, and strong regional appeal of Beijing, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move back (ranking number increasing) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 10350, in the range of 9850–10850.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 2662 → 2645 → 3014 → 2658, fluctuating narrowly within the 2600–3000 range, with a baseline of about 2658 in 2025; the provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 9 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 11 in 2024, 10 in 2025, and 14 in 2026, an increase of 4 students compared to 2025, a 40% expansion, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 41st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings; the university's level also has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (historical laboratory safety incident), but overall public opinion is stable; Douyin popularity ranks 45th overall (relatively hot); no admission gaps in the past 5 years; System Science A+, Management Science and Engineering A- are more science-oriented, but the Economics and Management Pilot Class (including Business Administration, Accounting) benefits from the A- discipline support in Management Science and Engineering; the Law major benefits from the university's overall reputation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major has relatively high social popularity, while Economics and Management categories show divergence and wait-and-see attitudes; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 535,000, with history category estimated at about 206,000, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025 (about 178,000), intensifying overall competition; Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Sichuan liberal arts candidates; the 2026 history category expansion to 14 students is the highest in recent years, indicating the university's emphasis on Sichuan liberal arts student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the game between the 2025 baseline ranking of 2658, the significant expansion in 2026 (+40%), and the increase in provincial history category candidates (+15.7%), the effect of expansion pushing back the ranking (increasing the ranking number) is significantly stronger than the intensified competition from increased candidates; however, given the university's level and the sustained appeal of Beijing's location, the ranking will not shift excessively backward; the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be about 3400, with a range of 3150–3650.
